programme.title: Have Thinning Hair? Keranique Can Help Regrow Beautiful, Thicker Hair!
programme.desc: If you have thinning hair or hair loss, Keranique can help regrow thicker, longer and fuller hair. Keranique is the number 1 hair regrowth system for women. Regain your confidence with beautiful, thicker and fuller hair in just 3 easy steps!

programme.title: Pain Relief Revealed
programme.desc: Discover the hidden story of OmegaXL with John Walsh. He dives deep into the groundbreaking supplement that promises hope and relief for millions battling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.desc: See why this cleaning tool replaces chemicals and hard labor!

programme.title: Relief from Inflammation
programme.desc: Connie Craig-Carrol & Founder Ken Meares investigates Omega XL, the ultimate all-natural solution for joint pain from inflammation.

programme.title: Dinner at Tiffani's
programme.desc: It's Mardi Gras at Tiffani's and she's got her take on the bayou for Bill Bellamy and his wife Kristen and Eric Close; hot crab and kale dip with Creole crostini, plus Tiffani's take on gumbo, a Sazerac cocktail, cheesy grits with blackened butter.

programme.title: Dinner at Tiffani's
programme.desc: Tiffani hosts a PJ party for her friends Bree Turner and Marla Sokoloff; she prepares savory potato pancakes and sausage and goat cheese egg casserole, a spicy Bloody Mary with maple bacon and a yogurt blini bar with all the sweet fixings.

programme.title: Dinner at Tiffani's
programme.desc: Tiffani prepares a veggie-inspired meal for Ross Mathews and Daisy Fuentes; caramelized winter squash risotto; grilled leeks with tarragon viaigrette; blood orange vanilla cocktails; cinnamon sugar baked pears with mascarpone and dried currants.

programme.title: Kelsey's Essentials
programme.desc: Kelsey turns turkey breast into a tender roast dip with melted gruyere; golden shrimp for a Cajun po' boy; BLT with sweet basil mayo and crispy pancetta; pressed picnic sandwich with roasted red peppers and pepperoncini spread.

programme.title: Kelsey's Essentials
programme.desc: Homemade candy bars; pomegranate and lime lollipops; frozen pie blended with vanilla ice cream to create a pie shake.

programme.title: Kelsey's Essentials
programme.desc: Global street food; cemitas; sandwich makers bring the flavors of Bombay to the masses; Italian porchetta sandwich; curried chickpea doubles.

programme.title: Kelsey's Essentials
programme.desc: Hand-cut cannelloni with luscious Italian sausage; spinach and ricotta in a simple red sauce; fettuccine with savory yellow squash and parmesan-lemon cream sauce.

programme.title: Kelsey's Essentials
programme.desc: Kelsey shares her essential tips and recipes for creating take out recipes at home.

programme.title: Kelsey's Essentials
programme.desc: Really simple pizza dough; chopped chicken caesar salad; decadent beet, bacon and herbed goat cheese flatbread; a calzone stuffed with three gooey cheeses; garlic knots.

programme.title: Symon's Suppers
programme.desc: Grilled pork tenderloin; braised cabbage side dish; cucumber jalapeno margarita.

programme.title: Symon's Suppers
programme.desc: Aged porterhouse; peach and blue cheese salad; simple macerated blackberries; classic Manhattan.

programme.title: Symon's Suppers
programme.desc: Bloody beer cocktail; slow roasted beets with buttermilk blue cheese; chicken thighs with kale and toasted walnuts.

programme.title: Symon's Suppers
programme.desc: Pot roast; negroni; ground polenta.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0
programme.desc: Albanese gummy butterflies; Savannah Candy Kitchen's chocolate gophers; chocolate bunnies; Peeps.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0
programme.desc: Alfonso explores foods with farm-fresh ingredients; the Georgian pecans going into Carolina Foods' Duchess Pecan Pies; the North Carolina potatoes in the Trinity Frozen Foods Southern Sweet Potato Fries; Mott's Snack & Go Strawberry Applesauce Pouch.

programme.title: Unique Eats
programme.desc: Come see what's between the buns at these burger joints that are taking the American classic to the next level.

programme.title: Unique Eats
programme.desc: Chicago's innovative restaurants draw food-lovers from around the country; meat-filled sandwiches; Asian-inspired street food; authentic Mexican tacos; brunch dishes with a fine-dining twist.

programme.title: Unique Eats
programme.desc: A Mexican brunch in Boulder, Colo.; how one chef in New York is really breaking the mold; small delicacies in Washington D.C.; a grocery store-turned Mexican food hot spot.

programme.title: Unique Eats
programme.desc: Indulge your weekend cravings at some of the most unique brunch spots.

programme.title: Unique Eats
programme.desc: A San Francisco legend turns Chinese food on its head; a New York City favorite where American classics get a twist.

programme.title: Unique Eats
programme.desc: Flavors from around the world, from New York to Las Vegas to Philadelphia.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern gets a whole new taste of Alaska's Inside Passage. Fresh sea cucumbers; salmon eggs; fish heads.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America
programme.sub-title: Minnesota State Fair: Curds, Corn & Cracklins
programme.desc: Andrew visits the Minnesota State Fair where bizarre food is the main attraction; Scandinavian delicacy lutefisk; deep-fried candy bars.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America
programme.desc: Andrew finds out if it is food that keeps Detroit's motor running. Andrew visits Motown and gets revved up about tasting some of the city's food, including iconic soul food and lamb brain sandwiches, in the heart of Arab America.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America
programme.desc: Beef tongue sandwiches; Korean soul foods that include boiled pig stomach and blood sausage; traditional bay foods like barbecued muskrat and grilled eel.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America
programme.desc: Andrew finds out that some of the best foods in LA are hiding deep inside city neighborhoods; pig head tamales; steamed chicken embryo.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America
programme.desc: Rocky Mountain oysters at a ballpark; yak and elk served at an historic restaurant; pheasant cooked outside.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate
programme.desc: Pizza; crispy fried chicken; juicy duck; pasta; sweet smoky BBQ pork.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate

programme.title: The Zimmern List
programme.desc: Andrew visits Philadelphia and reveals its status as a cultural crossroads by making stops at Mexican, Indonesian and Israeli restaurants; finally, a trip to Philadelphia isn't complete without visiting the oldest Italian restaurant in America.

programme.title: The Zimmern List
programme.desc: Andrew heads to Charleston, S.C., where his first order of business is paying a visit to the queen of soul food; he chows down on Gullah cuisine, a favorite among locals, and indulges in fresh seafood.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson finds that marrying dishes to create something new is a genius life hack; whether it's a combination of cultures or a surprising mix of flavors, a good mash-up is an exciting way to bring meals to the next level.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson finds the best south-of-the-border flavors in the U.S., with a combination of spices, fresh ingredients and traditional cooking styles unlike anything else.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Freedom to Leave the House! Inogen Portable Oxygen
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Joint Relief Revolution
programme.desc: Join Connie Craig-Carroll and health visionary Ken Meares as they uncover OmegaXL, the groundbreaking natural supplement transforming lives by tackling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Adam Richman Eats Britain
programme.desc: Adam is in Lancashire to taste the historic, hearty hot pot. He also samples a banging Brazilian sausage roll, world-famous black pudding from a secret recipe and a wonderful chicken-topped waffle.

programme.title: Adam Richman Eats Britain
programme.desc: Adam tries a tattie scone in Scone, tastes Scotland's national dish, haggis, neeps and tatties, and some sweet shortbread.

programme.title: Big Food Truck Tip
programme.desc: Andrew attends a food truck rally in Huntington Beach, Calif.; he meets buddies who traded in corporate jobs to open their Chinese-inspired food truck, Mad Dumplings; their menu includes dumplings stuffed with fried chicken and longanisa sausage.

programme.title: Big Food Truck Tip
programme.sub-title: Food Trucks Get Rolling in SLC
programme.desc: Andrew visits The Gateway, Salt Lake City's premiere outdoor shopping center; he meets the owners of The Salty Pineapple, a colorful Hawaiian lunch plate truck that serves up Kalua Pig, Garlic Chicken and a hand-mashed fruit drink called O'tai.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Arkansas State Fair for the Arkansas Slamwich, the Stuffed Thanksgiving Taco and more; a savory funnel cake called the Chick 'N' Cake, deep-fried rice pudding and other delights.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is in carnivore mode for the San Angelo Stock Show and Rodeo in Texas; from the Southwest Dog to the Show Hog, no one goes home hungry; a steak out in the form of the Spud Steak Sandwich; a midway mashup, the Apple Cheesecake Quesadilla.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.sub-title: Ohio State Fair; NC Potato Festival
programme.desc: Pulled Pork Donut in Ohio and Calabash Flounder in North Carolina.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Fair eats such as the Dynamite dog, North Wood sandwich and barbecue nachos; prairie poutine and a habanero crunch burger.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food
programme.desc: Spice-loving chefs preparing the hottest recipes in America; featuring fiery dishes including flaming-hot noodles, hot chicken, pepper-packed burritos, spicy jerk chicken wings, and a soup of liquid flames.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food
programme.desc: Roger Mooking wraps his hands around fifteen of the best sandwiches, tacos, pizza slices, chicken wings and more; some of the country's best and most creative chefs give a peek inside their kitchens.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food
programme.desc: The best surf-and-turf dishes in restaurants across America, including the classic lobster tail and steak, clam and bacon pizza, crab cakes with sausage, and even a lobster-and-steak roll.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food
programme.desc: Roger Mooking visits the most creative chefs in the U.S. to get their mouthwatering secrets for meaty celebrations that include whole hog barbecue, buffalo meatloaf and more.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Food Paradise
programme.desc: Eye-popping portions and belly-filling bounties of food make these eats totally epic; a seven-meat sandwich, a 2-foot-tall nacho tower, mountainous sundaes, a stuffed turkey leg and huge seafood platters make up the best of the biggest.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Food Paradise
programme.desc: Everything old is new again as classic comfort food favorites become unique mashups, like spaghetti grilled cheese, crab Rangoon french fries, barbacoa stroganoff, chicken and waffle doughnuts, and even a meatball burrito.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Food Paradise
programme.desc: Digging into pit-roasted chicken, blackened catfish, smoked brisket, grilled paella and Santa Maria-style ribs; beefy burgers and tantalizing tacos get kissed with flames.

programme.title: Food Paradise
programme.desc: Coastal hotspots combine comfort foods with epic views; indulging in lobster mac 'n' cheese, cheese-stuffed burgers, saucy seafood pasta, Key lime pie and more.

programme.title: Man Fire Food
programme.desc: Roger Mooking helps guest chef Jeremy Conner prepare a fish roast; marinated whole red fish and pompano on sugar cane poles; ribs al pastor and fry tilapia.

programme.title: Man Fire Food
programme.desc: Roger Mooking cruises the Florida coastline looking for two fiery cookouts that bring the heat; he visits chef Marcel Vizcarra, owner of modern Peruvian eatery Llama Restaurant in St. Augustine, Fla., to check out an ancient Peruvian-style pit roast.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Man Fire Food
programme.desc: Roger visits two caterers in the South who specialize in live-fire cookouts; Argentinian grill master Mariano Cebrián in Chattanooga, Tenn.; Roger meets Chef Kristian Niemi of Honey River Catering in Columbia, S.C.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Man Fire Food
programme.desc: Smoke signals lead Roger to two popular food trucks in Texas that serve delicious ethnic eats; Roger meets pitmaster Trey Sánchez of Vaqueros Bar-B-Q and Justin and Lakana Trubiana of DEE DEE.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Man Fire Food
programme.desc: Roger heads to Hawaii, where chef Lee Anne Wong fires up a custom-made stainless steel shelving unit; In Bellaire, Texas, Roger steps into the smoke at Blood Bros. BBQ, where brothers Robin and Terry Wong cook up creative barbecue.

programme.title: Man Fire Food
programme.desc: Roger visits two Texas pitmasters who give breakfast a wake-up call by adding barbecue; Guess Family Barbecue restaurant in Waco and Derek Allan's Texas BBQ in Fort Worth.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Anthony visits Provence, a region of France characterized by its impoverished history and the people's hard labor.
